column1: Turns a fuzzy structural request into a specific day_structure, so the same request always resolves the same way. The AI matches the user's day count and what they want to de-emphasise or emphasise, reads the resolved day_structure, then validates it through Custom Split Rules (coverage, 48-hour spacing, shared volume). If the user's phrasing does not match a row, offer the two nearest rows and let them pick. The resolved structure still passes through every safety and volume rule unchanged. This table decides STRUCTURE only, never how hard anything is trained.

column4: Two days is always full body. Nothing to bias.
Default 3-day. Everything 3x if beginner, or PPL by preference.
One lower day, two upper-focused days. Legs hit once, directly.
Two lower days, one upper day. Upper muscles hit once, legs twice.
One of each, push gets the freshest day.
One lower day, three upper-focused days. Legs hit once, upper muscles twice or more.
Two lower days plus push and pull. Legs emphasised.
Honours a push-biased week with legs still once.
One lower day, upper volume spread across four days.
Legs once across six days, everything else high frequency.
